programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science reveals new discoveries about the mutilated mummy of a young woman with a secret link to Tutankhamun; as experts use modern-day criminal forensics to follow fresh leads, the bloody trail leads straight to the Boy King.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Leading scientists and Egyptologists use state-of-the-art forensics to investigate the Niagara Falls mummy and search for its true identity; how a legendary ancient Egyptian pharaoh ended up on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files

programme.title: What on Earth?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. This program presents a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe - particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity, traveled with Jesus and is said to have witnessed his crucifixion and resurrection.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mystery still surrounds how fascist dictator Benito Mussolini met his end, before being hanged.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates Johann Reichhart, a German executioner who killed approximately 3,000 people during World War II.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican Secret Archives is a treasure trove of history that is shrouded in secrecy; Jamie Theakston heads to Rome in a bid to gain access.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service 7, a force that operated in 9 countries.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies
programme.desc: Unearthing the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies
programme.desc: Delving into the world of the KKK, which is just a shadow of its former self, and looking at the impact the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A car carrying three men pulls up alongside another on an Alaskan highway and fires shots, leaving a passenger dead; one of the passengers in the killer's car agrees to testify against his friends; the resulting trials don't end the carnage.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a human skeleton is found on marshland and determined to be at least 18 months old, a computer consultant gives her a face and name.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: The murder of teacher's aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community; as rumors spread about suspects, the actual perpetrator slips further away.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A single mom vanishes without a trace; foul play is confirmed after a truck toolbox opens with her body inside; homicide detectives investigate men she matched on dating sites, men from work, and a lover with a violent past.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A 20-year-old woman sets out on her bike and never returns; her body is found a few miles from her house with a gunshot wound to the head; years go by without any evidence or leads, until new investigators and technology breaks the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant is murdered while deployed out to sea; arsenic poisoning is the cause of death; investigators discover he had more than his fair share of enemies, but it takes years before investigators discover what really happened to him.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in the bathtub; when questioned, an ex-con living downstairs lies to police; the lies do not prove murder and the case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape; the crime scene looks like a clear robbery-murder; text evidence at first points to a jilted lover, but police identify a second suspect with a motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A wounded woman calls 911; her husband, who wants a divorce, gets a hard look from police, but he has an airtight alibi during the murder; forensic science of ballistics draws a direct connection.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire investigator determines if a kerosene heater is the cause of a fire that killed one person or if it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives are suspicious after a woman is killed in a hunting accident, but it takes more than twenty years before a trace evidence analyst is able to match fibers on a soiled blanket to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defence lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit and run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stock broker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Stanley Moon (Dudley Moore) is a bumbling short-order cook, infatuated with Margaret (Eleanor Bron), the statuesque waitress he works with at Wimpy Burger in London. On the verge of suicide, he meets George Spiggott (Peter Cook), the devil, who, in return for his soul, grants him seven wishes to woo the challenging Margaret. Despite the wishes and the advice of the Seven Deadly Sins, including Lil

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: At a carnival, young Josh Baskin wishes he were big, only to wake up the next morning and discover his wish came true. But the more Josh experiences life as an adult, the more he longs for the simple joys of childhood.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: During a wild vacation in Las Vegas, career woman Joy McNally (Cameron Diaz) and playboy Jack Fuller (Ashton Kutcher) come to the sober realization that they have married each other after a night of drunken abandon. Besides that, there is a huge jackpot at stake. An implacable judge freezes the prize money and refuses to grant an annulment, so Joy and Jack must try to make their impromptu marriage

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: New York lawyer Carly Whitten (Cameron Diaz) lives by strict rules when it comes to romantic relationships, but when she falls for suave, handsome Mark King (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau), she begins an affair with him. A surprise visit to Mark's home reveals that he is married to devoted housewife Kate (Leslie Mann). Carly and Kate direct their hurt and anger toward Mark, and when they discover yet a th

programme.title: Why Him?
programme.desc: During the holidays, loving but overprotective Ned (Bryan Cranston) travels to California to visit his daughter Stephanie (Zoey Deutch) at Stanford University. While there, he meets his biggest nightmare: her well-meaning but socially awkward boyfriend, Laird (James Franco). Even though Laird is a multimillionaire, Ned disapproves of his freewheeling attitude and unfiltered language. His panic lev

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: How to Be Very, Very Popular
programme.desc: A showgirl from the San Francisco cabaret is murdered, and the only witnesses are fellow showgirls Stormy Tornado (Betty Grable) and Curly Flagg (Sheree North). Afraid of both the murderers and the cops, the two go on the run, eventually deciding to pose as male students at Bristol College. programme.title: Wild on the Beach
programme.desc: Music and romance abound as two groups of college students fight for their right to party at a beach house.

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller (George Segal) is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt (Senta Berger), a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meet

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone (Patrick O'Neal) and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov (Bibi Andersson), the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police (Max von Sydow). Their plans are in

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist org

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: New York City custodian Daryll Deever (William Hurt) is a big fan of local news reporter Tony Sokolow (Sigourney Weaver), so he is intrigued when she shows up to cover a story at his workplace. There's been a murder in the office building, and Tony suspects that Daryll may have insight into the crime, a notion that he furthers to stay close to her. programme.title: Gleaming the Cube
programme.desc: A California skateboarder (Christian Slater) solves and avenges the death of his adopted Vietnamese brother.

programme.title: The Machine
programme.desc: The past comes back to haunt Bert Kreischer when a murderous mobster tries to kidnap him to atone for his crimes. With help from his estranged father, Bert must retrace the steps of his younger self as a sociopathic crime family goes to war.

programme.title: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: Tired of their humdrum lives, some middle-aged friends decide to temporarily ditch their responsibilities and take a motorcycle trip. programme.title: Moulin Rouge

When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

programme.title: Cinema Verite The Saga of an American Family

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
